article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. Child Care Resource Group Update and 2026 Workplan 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Approving Burnaby's Child Care Resource Group 2026 Workplan
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on endorsing the Child Care Resources Group's 2026 workplan and approving $3,000 in funding to support child care provider events and professional development activities.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if you operate a child care facility — planned process improvements could affect how you open or modify your space.
